basic_details.job_title: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 43 Staff Nurse, ANM and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Staff Nurse, ANM, Pharmacist, Lab Technician, Public Health Manager, Epidemiologist
basic_details.short_information: The Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC) has officially announced the Staff Nurse, ANM, Pharmacist, Lab Technician, Public Health Manager, Epidemiologist Recruitment 2026 with 43 openings. The detailed notification was published on the official website of NMMC.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years Age Relaxation for Reserved Category: 43 years

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Pass and GNM/B.Sc Nursing with Maharashtra Nursing Council registration, 10th Pass and ANM with Maharashtra Nursing Council registration, B.Pharm/D.Pharm with Maharashtra Pharmacy Council registration, 12th + Diploma, MBBS/Graduate in Health Sciences + MPH/MHA/MBA, Medical Graduate with MPH/MHA/MBA
qualification.details: Staff Nurse (Female/Male): 12th Pass and General Nursing and Midwifery Diploma or B.Sc Nursing Course passed. Maharashtra Nursing Council registration mandatory. ANM: 10th Pass and ANM Course passed. Maharashtra Nursing Council registration mandatory. Pharmacist: B.Pharm Graduate or D.Pharm. Maharashtra Pharmacy Council registration mandatory. Lab Technician: 12th + Diploma. Public Health Manager: MBBS or Graduate in Health Sciences (B.D.S/B.A.M.S/B.H.M.S/B.U.M/B.P.Th/Nursing Basic/(P.B.Bsc)/B.Pharma) + MPH/MHA/MBA in Health Care Administration. Epidemiologist: Any Medical Graduate with MPH/MHA/MBA in Health.

salary_details.details: Staff Nurse (Female/Male): Rs. 20000 Per Month ANM: Rs. 18000 Per Month Pharmacist: Rs. 17000 Per Month Lab Technician: Rs. 17000 Per Month Public Health Manager: Rs. 32000 Per Month Epidemiologist: Rs. 35000 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NMMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: nmmc.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.navi_mumbai_municipal_corporation_nmmc: Staff Nurse, ANM, Pharmacist, Lab Technician, Public Health Manager, Epidemiologist

12th Pass and GNM/B.Sc Nursing with Maharashtra Nursing Council registration, 10th Pass and ANM with Maharashtra Nursing Council registration, B.Pharm/D.Pharm with Maharashtra Pharmacy Council registration, 12th + Diploma, MBBS/Graduate in Health Sciences + MPH/MHA/MBA, Medical Graduate with MPH/MHA/MBA

content_sections.heading: NMMC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NMMC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NMMC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Staff Nurse (Female/Male): 12th Pass and General Nursing and Midwifery Diploma or B.Sc Nursing Course passed. Maharashtra Nursing Council registration mandatory. ANM: 10th Pass and ANM Course passed. Maharashtra Nursing Council registration mandatory. Pharmacist: B.Pharm Graduate or D.Pharm. Maharashtra Pharmacy Council registration mandatory. Lab Technician: 12th + Diploma. Public Health Manager: MBBS or Graduate in Health Sciences (B.D.S/B.A.M.S/B.H.M.S/B.U.M/B.P.Th/Nursing Basic/(P.B.Bsc)/B.Pharma) + MPH/MHA/MBA in Health Care Administration. Epidemiologist: Any Medical Graduate with MPH/MHA/MBA in Health.

content_sections.heading: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 38 years Age Relaxation for Reserved Category: 43 years

content_sections.heading: NMMC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Staff Nurse (Female/Male): Rs. 20000 Per Month ANM: Rs. 18000 Per Month Pharmacist: Rs. 17000 Per Month Lab Technician: Rs. 17000 Per Month Public Health Manager: Rs. 32000 Per Month Epidemiologist: Rs. 35000 Per Month

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NMMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: nmmc.gov.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NMMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NMMC Various Health Posts is 06 July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NMMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 43 vacancies announced for various health posts in the Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NMMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for NMMC Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to most of the posts is 38 years. However, age relaxation is provided for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 17,000 to Rs. 35,000 per month, depending on the specific post and its responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for NMMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for NMMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a Merit List, as indicated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Which educational qualifications are required for the Staff Nurse posts?
faq.answer: For Staff Nurse posts, candidates need to have passed 12th grade and possess a General Nursing and Midwifery Diploma or a B.Sc Nursing degree, along with Maharashtra Nursing Council registration.

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for NMMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application start date is 24 June 2026, and the application last date is 06 July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Navi Mumbai Municipal Corporation (NMMC), which is nmmc.gov.in.
